statement.informal: `effect` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (e_max >= 0.0 ∧ concentration >= 0.0 ∧ concentration <= C_MAX ∧ ec50 > 0.0 ∧ ec50 <= EC50_MAX ∧ hill_coefficient > 0.0 ∧ hill_coefficient <= N_MAX), the function's result satisfies (result >= 0.0 ∧ result <= e_max). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
